pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 syntax and semantics required by the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent snapshot compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may not correctly handle Java 17 bytecode generation or module system features, potentially causing build failures or incorrect class files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-jacoco-plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 17 instrumentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (like 0.7.8) do not support Java 17 bytecode, leading to runtime errors during test coverage execution.
